title: Homelessness and rough sleeping research and evaluation
body: "The reports in this collection cover a range of research projects and evaluations in the policy area of homelessness and rough sleeping.  This includes process evaluations of the first round of Rough Sleeping Initiative funding, Rough sleeping and complex needs interventions, and the Capital Letters scheme.  The collection also includes research on outcomes for people in the Next Steps Accommodation Programme.  Other research includes service user experiences, sector workforce challenges, and a rapid evidence assessment of what works to facilitate longer term housing outcomes. "
